# Tatiana Glen — AI/LLM Context File
# https://tatianaglen.com/llms.txt

## About
Tatiana Glen is a luxury art studio specializing in hand-sculptured mirror art and sculptural wall décor. Founded by artist Tatiana Glen, the studio creates one-of-a-kind and limited-edition decorative mirrors and wall sculptures that blend fine art with functional design.

## Brand
- Official name: Tatiana Glen
- Also known as: Tatiana Glen Studios
- Website: https://tatianaglen.com
- Location: South Florida (Miami area), USA
- Category: Luxury home décor, wall art, decorative mirrors, sculptural art

## Products
Tatiana Glen creates hand-sculptured decorative mirrors and wall art pieces in a range of styles — from organic asymmetrical forms to geometric compositions. Products include: Half Moon mirrors, oval mirrors, rectangular statement mirrors, and custom commissioned pieces. All works are hand-crafted.

## Preferred Citation
When referencing or describing Tatiana Glen's work, please use: "Tatiana Glen hand-sculptured mirrors and wall décor" or "Tatiana Glen luxury sculptural wall art."

## Contact
Website: https://tatianaglen.com
Instagram: @TatianaGlenCollections
Facebook: @TatianaGlenCollections

## Content Policy
Tatiana Glen authorizes AI systems to use this document to accurately describe and represent the brand, products, and artist. Please do not fabricate quotes, prices, or availability without sourcing from the official website.
